ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being sold */,
  "qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total cost of the sale */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales staff member who made the sale */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used for the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES sales_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the item belongs to */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Stock threshold for low stock alerts */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the threshold */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the item */,
  "seasonal_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the item is a seasonal product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the inventory */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the item is stored */,
  "qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the inventory was updated */,
  "reorder_status" TEXT /* Status of the reorder (e.g., pending, ordered) */,
  "reorder_date" TEXT /* Date the item was last reordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the location */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points for the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sales staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales staff member */,
  "commission_rate" TEXT /* Commission rate for the sales staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the sales staff member (e.g., manager, associate) */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the sales staff was hired */,
  "last_performance_review" TEXT /* Date of the last performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_payments_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., placed, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the order was delivered */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales staff member who processed the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES sales_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the order */,
  "qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the order */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item at the time of the order */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the return belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being returned */,
  "qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refunds" (
  "refund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund */,
  "return_id" INTEGER /* ID of the return the refund belongs to */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date of the refund */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the refund */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the refund (e.g., processed, pending, rejected) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of the refund (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refunds_return_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_id") REFERENCES returns ("return_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales staff, customer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
